---
title: "verify_alfred.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\quarantine\verify_alfred.py"
loc: 12
complexity: 2
logic_score: 6.15
style_score: 6.83
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 4.04
---

## Intent
The `verify_alfred.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on internal logic. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via internal logic. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 6.2/10
- **Style [S]**: 6.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 4 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [os](file://os)
- [src.core.engine.alfred_observer](file://src.core.engine.alfred_observer)

### Exports
Internal logic only.
